payload.entity_name: Xinjiang Baocheng International Cotton Co., Ltd.
payload.reason: Forced labor in Xinjiang cotton supply chain. Entity procures and processes cotton using labor transferred under the Xinjiang government's labor transfer programs.
payload.shipment_impact: Goods containing fiber sourced from this entity cannot enter the United States without a successful rebuttal presumption waiver from CBP.
payload.action_required: Contact customs broker immediately to assess supply chain traceability and prepare UFLPA waiver documentation.

citations.title: UFLPA Entity List — Department of Homeland Security
